title: lewisia megarhiza
intro: Lewisia megarhiza, also known as the Beargrass or Mountain Beauty, is a perennial flowering plant native to the western United States and Canada. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and expectorant, helping to relieve congestion and coughs. The plant is rich in vitamins A and C, as well as minerals like calcium and iron, providing various health benefits such as antioxidant and immune-boosting properties. Traditionally, the roots of Lewisia megarhiza have been used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, to treat respiratory issues and promote overall well-being.
